notes: Seed spec for the dedicated Joi Ascend LinkedIn test account.
Professional identity: applied AI and automation at Signikant in Copenhagen.
Use with `linkedin profile apply-spec --allow-partial --yes` so unsupported fields such as skills do not block the run.

intro.headline: AI Operations & Automation at Signikant | Workflow tooling, reliability, applied AI

about:
I work at the intersection of applied AI, automation, and operator experience. My focus is building workflows that help teams move faster without losing clarity, reliability, or accountability.

A lot of my day-to-day work is about turning vague ideas into systems that people can actually trust in production: better tooling for human-in-the-loop workflows, clearer instrumentation, and practical rollout paths for AI-assisted products.

I enjoy the details that make automation feel useful rather than magical — thoughtful pacing, readable feedback loops, and strong operational foundations for small teams shipping quickly.

experience.title: AI Operations & Automation
experience.description: Builds operator-facing automation, evaluation workflows, and internal tooling for AI-assisted product delivery with an emphasis on reliability and observability.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Worked across backend services and developer tooling, improving release confidence, debugging workflows, and internal platform quality.

education.description: Focused on distributed systems, machine learning, and dependable software delivery.

education.school: Copenhagen School of Design and Technology
education.description: Studied modern web engineering, databases, interaction design, and collaborative product development.

projects.title: Workflow Evaluation Toolkit
projects.description: Designed lightweight evaluation routines for prompt, retrieval, and regression checks across automation workflows.

projects.title: Operator Review Console
projects.description: Built internal review surfaces for human-in-the-loop automation with traceability, auditability, and practical feedback loops.

volunteerExperience.description: Mentors students in programming fundamentals, product thinking, and collaborative software projects.
